nodes.name: Mountain leaf warbler
nodes.summary: The mountain leaf warbler (Phylloscopus trivirgatus) is a songbird species from the leaf warbler family (Phylloscopidae). It was formerly included in the "Old World warbler" assemblage. It is found in Indonesia and Malaysia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References

nodes.name: Mountain leaf warbler
nodes.summary: Mountain leaf warbler（Phylloscopus trivirgatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mountain leaf warbler。

nodes.name: Phylloscopus
nodes.summary: Phylloscopus（Phylloscopus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联80种鸟类，如Western Bonelli's warbler、Eastern Bonelli's warbler、橙斑翅柳莺等80种鸟类。
